nasb.text: and a sword will pierce even your own soul—to the end that thoughts from many hearts may be revealed.”

esv.text: (and a sword will pierce through your own soul also), so that thoughts from many hearts may be revealed.”

cnv.text: 這樣，許多人心中的意念就要被揭露出來。”

ccb.text: 好叫许多人的心思意念暴露出来，你自己则会心如刀割。”

csbs.text: 这样，许多人的心思意念将被显露出来；你自己的灵魂也要被剑刺透。”
